name: C2xDispatchPacket
title: C2xDispatchPacket
syntax: long C2xDispatchPacket( long packet, dword direction );
description: This function dispatches a packet to CANoe application (analyze), it isn’t given to the hardware driver. The direction (Rx, Tx TxRq) that is displayed e.g. in the Trace Window can be defined.

parameters.name: packet
parameters.description: Handle of a packet that has been initialized and completed (see example).

return: Handle of a packet that has been initialized and
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
